legal.error_must_accept: You must accept the terms to continue.
legal.disclaimer_point1_title: Michi is a Pure Information Intermediary
legal.disclaimer_point1_desc: Michi does not participate in any transactions. We do not process payments, arrange shipping, verify product quality, or provide transaction guarantees.
legal.disclaimer_point2_desc: Your agreement with any proxy shopper is entirely private. Michi is not a party to any agreement between you and a proxy shopper.
legal.disclaimer_point3_title: Michi Does Not Guarantee Proxy Shopper Trustworthiness
legal.disclaimer_point3_desc: Our verification confirms identity and Japan residence only. We do NOT verify professional competence, honesty, reliability, or service quality.
legal.disclaimer_point4_desc: You accept full risk of fraud, non-delivery, counterfeit products, shipping loss, and any other transaction problems. Michi will not refund or compensate you.
legal.disclaimer_point5_desc: If a proxy shopper does not deliver or disappears, Michi cannot help. You must resolve disputes directly with the proxy shopper or contact law enforcement.
legal.jurisdiction_us: United Kingdom: Under UK law, Michi operates as an information society service and intermediary. We are not liable for transactions between users under the Electronic Commerce Regulations 2002.
legal.jurisdiction_hk: Hong Kong: Under Hong Kong supply of services law, Michi commits to reasonable care but you accept all transaction risks.
legal.jurisdiction_jp: Japan: Under Japan's Consumer Contract Act, Michi's responsibility is limited to providing verified information.
legal.jurisdiction_other: Multiple Jurisdictions: Michi is an information intermediary and you assume all transaction risks.

bp.payFullDesc: Pay in full after order confirmation. Lower risk for shopper, common for limited items.
bp.payDepositDesc: Pay deposit (usually 30-50%) upfront, balance after item secured. Good for large orders.

bp.buyer1_desc: Harajuku fashion expert specializing in vintage and limited collaborations. Expert at finding Supreme, Palace, Undercover exclusives.

ap.heroDesc: Michi was founded by the creator of Global EZshop. With over 13 years of hands-on Japanese proxy shopping, Michi is a path built by someone who walked every step.
ap.founderTitle: Every Pain Point and Joy of Proxy Shopping
ap.founder_p1: In 2011, I started Global EZshop on Facebook, driven by my passion for Japan. I'd fly there carrying huge bags, hunting through department stores and drugstores.
ap.founder_p2: Over the years, the business grew — I rented an office and warehouse in Hong Kong, serving SME retailers with Japanese wholesale. We processed thousands of orders.
ap.founder_p3: Through it all, one thing became clear: finding a reliable on-the-ground shopper in Japan is incredibly difficult. You need someone actually there, who speaks the language.
ap.founder_p4: That's why I created Michi (道). Not to replace proxy shopping, but to help talented Japan-based shoppers be discovered — to become your path to Japan.
ap.officeCaption: Global EZshop Hong Kong Office · Warehouse
ap.tl1_desc: Started proxy shopping on Facebook, building loyal customers through word of mouth.
ap.tl2_desc: Established Global EZshop, upgrading from individual to company, serving SME retailers.
ap.tl3_desc: Rented office and warehouse in Hong Kong, providing wholesale shipping and high-volume orders.
ap.tl4_desc: Built local shopper networks in Tokyo, Osaka, Kyoto, sourcing directly from stores and events.
ap.tl5_desc: Opened years of proxy shopping resources to the public, connecting global buyers with Japan-based shoppers.
ap.galleryTitle: Every Good Thing Brought Back from Japan
ap.galleryDesc: All photos taken by Global EZshop during actual sourcing trips. From store visits to wholesale packing, every step is hands-on.
ap.whyTitle: Why a Proxy Shopper Built Michi
ap.why1_desc: From ordering, queueing, packing to customs — firsthand experience at every stage.
ap.why2_desc: Not just reselling — finding items truly worth having from Japan.
ap.why3_desc: Years of building a shopper network in Japan — a core advantage no platform can replicate.
ap.platformNoteDesc: Michi is an information platform. We do not participate in transactions or guarantee outcomes. All transactions are at users' own risk.
ap.ctaDesc: Browse shoppers across Japan and find the right person for your needs.

terms.notice_content: Michi is a pure information platform. We do not participate in transactions, process payments, arrange shipping, or bear any responsibility for transactions between users. By using this platform you agree to all terms below.
terms.section1_content: By accessing or using Michi (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform. You must be at least 18 years old.
terms.section2_intro: Michi grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to:
terms.section2_point1: Browse shopper profiles and product information
terms.section2_point3: Submit applications to become a shopper
terms.section2_point4: Use the AI product search features
terms.section3_intro: As a buyer, you agree to:
terms.section3_point2: Verify shopper identity and reputation independently
terms.section3_point3: Negotiate payment terms directly with shoppers
terms.section3_point4: Not hold Michi liable for any transaction issues
terms.section4_intro: As a shopper, you agree to:
terms.section4_point1: Provide truthful and accurate personal information
terms.section4_point3: Comply with local Japanese laws and regulations
terms.section4_point4: Not use the platform for any fraudulent activity
terms.section5_point1: Michi does not process any payments
terms.section5_point2: All payments occur directly between buyers and shoppers
terms.section5_point3: Michi bears no responsibility for payment disputes
terms.section6_critical: ⚠️ Michi provides no warranties of any kind regarding shopper service quality, product authenticity, transaction safety, or any other aspect.
terms.section6_content: All information on the platform is for reference only. Michi does not verify the accuracy of information provided by shoppers.
terms.section7_critical: ⚠️ To the maximum extent permitted by law, Michi and its owners/employees shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of this platform.
terms.section7_content: This includes but is not limited to: transaction losses, product quality issues, fraud losses, data loss, or any other financial losses.
terms.section8_point1: Use the platform for fraud or illegal activities
terms.section8_point5: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
terms.section9_step1_desc: Buyers and shoppers should first attempt to resolve issues through direct communication.
terms.section9_step2_desc: If direct communication fails, contact your payment provider (PayPal, bank, etc.) for chargebacks.
terms.section9_step3_desc: If unresolved, consider legal action. Note that Michi is not a party to the dispute.
terms.section10_us_desc: Governed by the laws of England and Wales. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of England.
terms.section10_hk_desc: Governed by HKSAR law. Disputes resolved in Hong Kong courts.
terms.section10_jp_desc: Governed by Japanese law. Disputes resolved at Tokyo District Court.
terms.section11_content: Michi reserves the right to terminate or suspend your access at any time, for any reason, without prior notice.
terms.section12_content: Michi reserves the right to amend these terms at any time. Continued use after amendments constitutes acceptance.
terms.section13_intro: For questions about these terms, contact us:
terms.legal_statement: ⚠️ These Terms of Service are legally binding. By accessing or using Michi, you confirm you have read, understood, and agreed to all terms. If you disagree, stop using the platform immediately.

privacy.intro: Michi ("we") values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.section1_1_desc: Name, email address, contact details (when you contact shoppers or apply as a shopper).
privacy.section1_2_desc: IP address, browser type, visit time, page views.
privacy.section1_3_desc: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to improve our service.
privacy.section1_4_desc: Your search queries may be used to improve AI product recommendation features.
privacy.section2_point3: Improve user experience and platform features
privacy.section3_intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share in these situations:
privacy.section3_warning: When you contact a shopper, your contact info (name and email) is shared with that shopper for communication.
privacy.section4_right1_desc: You can request to see the personal information we hold about you.
privacy.section4_right2_desc: You can request correction of inaccurate information.
privacy.section4_right3_desc: You can request deletion of your personal information.
privacy.section4_right4_desc: You can request we limit how we process your information.
privacy.section4_right5_desc: You can request your information in a common format.
privacy.section4_footer: To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below.
privacy.section5_desc: We use the following types of cookies:
privacy.section5_essential_desc: Required for basic site functionality like language settings and login status.
privacy.section5_analytics_desc: Help us understand how users interact with the site to improve our service.
privacy.section5_marketing_desc: Not currently used. If used in future, this policy will be updated.
privacy.section6_intro: We take the following measures to protect your information:
privacy.section7_desc: We only retain personal information as long as necessary. Shopper applications kept 12 months after processing. Contact records kept 24 months.
privacy.section8_us_desc: Under UK GDPR, you have full data subject rights including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and portability. You may also lodge a complaint with the ICO.
privacy.section8_hk_desc: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance, you have the right to access and correct your personal data.
privacy.section8_eu_desc: You have all data subject rights under GDPR including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and portability.
privacy.section8_jp_desc: Under Japan's Act on Protection of Personal Information, you may request disclosure, correction, or deletion.
privacy.section10_desc: We may update this policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with the updated date.
privacy.confirmation: By using Michi, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.

disclaimer.intro: Michi is a pure information intermediary platform. We do not participate in transactions, process payments, verify product quality, or bear responsibility for any transaction disputes.
disclaimer.s1_content: Michi is an information intermediary connecting buyers with Japan-based proxy shoppers. We provide contact information and verification, but do not participate in actual transactions.
disclaimer.s2_p1: No guarantee of shopper honesty, reliability, or service quality
disclaimer.s2_p2: No guarantee of product authenticity, quality, or legality
disclaimer.s2_p3: No guarantee of shipping, delivery, or refunds
disclaimer.s2_p4: No guarantee of transaction safety or success
disclaimer.s3_intro: By using Michi, you agree that:
disclaimer.s3_p1: You bear all transaction risks yourself
disclaimer.s3_p2: You conduct all due diligence (verifying shopper identity, researching reputation, etc.)
disclaimer.s3_p3: You are solely responsible for payment and fund security
disclaimer.s3_p4: You cannot hold Michi liable for any issues
disclaimer.s4_intro: Michi and its owners, employees, and agents are not liable for:
disclaimer.s4_p2: Product quality issues or counterfeit goods
disclaimer.s5_intro: Michi does not mediate or resolve buyer-shopper disputes. You must:
disclaimer.s5_p2: Request chargebacks from your payment provider (PayPal, bank, credit card company)
disclaimer.s5_p3: Report fraud to local law enforcement
disclaimer.legal_content: This disclaimer is legally binding on all users. By accessing or using Michi, you agree to all terms in this disclaimer. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

premium.heroDesc: Top Japanese proxy shoppers vetted by Michi. Paid members enjoy priority placement, homepage features, and gold verification badges. Limited to 10 spots.
premium.benefit1_desc: Premium shoppers always appear at the top of the directory. Search results and homepage also prioritize your profile.
premium.benefit2_desc: Your profile displays a Premium ✦ badge, instantly signaling to buyers that you're a vetted top shopper.
premium.benefit3_desc: Featured on this exclusive page with full service intro, portfolio, and direct contact button.
premium.priorityReply: Premium shoppers typically reply within 1 hour.
premium.howTitle: How to Become a Premium Shopper
premium.step1_desc: Fill out the form with your proxy shopping experience and portfolio.
premium.step2_desc: Michi team reviews your application within 3 business days.
premium.step3_desc: Once approved, pay ¥29,800/month to activate Premium instantly.
premium.step4_desc: Your profile appears at the top of the directory and on this page immediately.
premium.ctaDesc: Join the elite shopper program for more buyer trust and visibility. Limited spots, first come first served.
premium.platformNote: Michi is an information platform and does not participate in transactions. Premium is a voluntary paid promotion service for shoppers.
premium.applySentDesc: We'll review your application and contact you within 3 business days.
premium.portfolioPlaceholder: Share links to social media, photo albums, or describe your track record...
premium.feeDesc: Includes: rank boost, gold badge, showcase page, priority support. Cancel anytime, effective next month.
premium.agreeTerms: I understand Premium is a voluntary paid promotion service. Michi does not guarantee any transaction volume or income. Monthly fees are non-refundable.
premium.buyer1_desc: Tokyo Harajuku fashion expert with 8 years of experience. Specializes in vintage, limited sneakers, and streetwear collabs. Weekly livestream shopping. 1,200+ orders completed.
premium.buyer2_desc: Tokyo's top beauty shopper, specializing in department store exclusives and drugstore new releases. Real-time @cosme ranking tracker. 2,100+ completed orders.
premium.buyer3_desc: Fukuoka sneaker and handbag expert, specializing in Asics, Porter, Onitsuka Tiger, and Bao Bao Issey Miyake. Expert at sourcing regional exclusives.

quote.heroDesc: Enter product price, auto-calculate commission, shipping & total. Generate shareable quotes for your clients.
quote.fxNote: Exchange rates are approximate, actual rate at time of payment applies
quote.tipDesc: Share this quote directly with your client. Print outputs only the quote card — perfect for screenshots or saving as PDF.
quote.disclaimer: This quote is generated by Michi's quote tool for reference only. Michi does not participate in transactions. Actual prices are subject to negotiation. Exchange rates and shipping costs may vary.

alerts.desc: Pick categories you're interested in. We'll email you when new products drop.
alerts.selectOne: Please select at least one category
alerts.privacy: Your email is only used for product alerts. Never shared. Unsubscribe anytime.
alerts.successDesc: We'll notify you when new exclusive products are found.

mem.heroDesc: Become a Michi member to contact Japan shoppers directly via WhatsApp, LINE, WeChat. First 90 days free.
mem.b1_desc: See every shopper's LINE, WhatsApp, WeChat — tap to chat directly.
mem.b2_desc: Contact any shopper, any time. Find the perfect proxy shopping expert.
mem.b3_desc: Get notified first when new limited products drop in Japan.
mem.trialNote: 90 days free access to all features. No credit card required.
mem.trialDesc: You can view all shopper contacts. Upgrade required after trial ends.
mem.noChargeTrial: No charge during trial. We'll email you before it ends.
mem.memberDesc: You have full access to all shopper contacts and unlimited inquiries.
mem.upgradeNote: Upgrade to continue viewing shopper contacts and using all features.
mem.faq1_a: None. Full access to everything for 90 days including contacts and unlimited inquiries.
mem.faq2_q: Will I be charged after trial?
mem.faq2_a: No. You must actively choose a plan. We never auto-charge.
mem.faq3_a: Yes. Monthly plans cancel anytime. Yearly plans run until expiry.
mem.faq4_q: What extras do paid members get?
mem.faq4_a: Same features as trial — payment simply continues your access after the 90 days.
